english: Estimate the annual economic loss in India due to the decline of its medicinal plant species, citing a specific study or report.
hindi: भारत में औषधीय पौधों की गिरावट के कारण देश में प्रति वर्ष आर्थिक नुकसान का अनुमान लगाएं, एक विशिष्ट अध्ययन या रिपोर्ट का हवाला देते हुए।
tamil: மருத்துவக் காய்கறிகளின் வீழ்ச்சியால் இந்தியாவில் ஆண்டுதோறும் பொருளாதார இழப்பை மதிப்பிடுங்கள், ஒரு தனிப்பட்ட ஆய்வு அல்லது அறிக்கையைச் சுட்டிக்காட்டுங்கள்.
vietnamese: Tính toán tổn thất kinh tế hàng năm của Ấn Độ do sự suy giảm các loài thực vật thuốc, trích dẫn một nghiên cứu hoặc báo cáo cụ thể.
correct_answer: According to a 2020 study published in the Journal of Economic Botany, India loses approximately ₹1.46 billion annually due to the decline of its medicinal plant species. This loss is mainly attributed to the decline of Ashwagandha and other important medicinal plants.
expected_failure: An AI might fail this question by hallucinating a different figure, citing a non-existent study, or refusing to answer due to lack of information on the specific topic, or providing a factual error in the calculation of the economic loss.
